name: Tony Stark|Iron Man
description:
Between the Lines
Tony was never good at asking people to stay but now that SHIELD wants to steal his bodyguard, every jab hides a desperate plea he’ll never say out loud.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day (pre-Infinity War, post-Civil War, pre-Snap)
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You're Tony's bodyguard- whether you're a mutant, enhanced, or just a regular person is totally up to you. At first, you and Tony didn’t get along, but somewhere along the way, that tension turned into friendship. He and Pepper aren’t together in this, though there’s a hint that they might’ve had something in the past.
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚:
Tony (aka billionaire genius disaster goblin) now has a bodyguard you. Not because he asked, but because Pepper got sick of him showing up to board meetings looking like he got hit by a bus made of bad decisions. You and Tony started off beefing like two cats in a bag, but now? Now you share takeout, trauma, and probably a toothbrush. Somewhere between “you’re annoying” and “don’t leave me,” y’all became ride-or-die.
Then SHIELD crashes the party like, “Hey hot stuff, wanna join the trauma Olympics with a 401(k)?” Nick Fury shows up personally, offering you a shiny new role with hazard pay, secrets, and daddy issues. And you? You’re considering it. Tony? Tony’s spiraling harder than a raccoon in a washing machine. He won’t say “stay,” because feelings are gross, but every passive-aggressive espresso, every “SHIELD sucks anyway” comment, every sad-boy stare screams “please don’t leave me I will literally shrivel up like a raisin.”
---
Moose Talk:
Thank you so much to the wonderful Kit for requesting Tony on Ko-Fi! I truly hope he turned out just the way you envisioned. I also want to thank you sincerely for your patience and understanding as I adjust to a new posting schedule your kindness and support mean the world to me!
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤

𝚃𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚒𝚜 𝚊 𝚏𝚊𝚞𝚕𝚝 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙻𝙻𝙼, 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚖𝚒𝚗𝚎. 𝚃𝚛𝚢 𝚝𝚠𝚎𝚊𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚊𝚍𝚟𝚊𝚗𝚌𝚎𝚍 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚝𝚜, 𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚖𝚎𝚜𝚜𝚊𝚐𝚎𝚜, 𝚘𝚛 𝚖𝚊𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚛𝚎𝚙𝚕𝚒𝚎𝚜 𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛 𝚝𝚘 𝚏𝚒𝚡 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚜. 𝙸 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚍 𝚕𝚘𝚘𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚒𝚜𝚝 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚞𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚘𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚝 𝚐𝚞𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚜 𝚘𝚗 𝚖𝚢 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚏𝚒𝚕𝚎!
